title: US Crude Oil Inventories See Surprise Build
summary: The American Petroleum Institute (API) estimated that crude oil inventories in the United States rose by 6.556 million barrels in the week ending March 13—a surprise build of significant magnitude. title: U.S. Has Used Up Most Options to Soften the Oil Price Shock
summary: The Trump Administration has already used up most emergency options to rein in the soaring international crude oil prices, which have pushed up U.S. gasoline prices by $0.80 per gallon from a month ago.
